name: cms-cultivator
description: 46 skills + 15 agents for Drupal/WordPress. Skills run directly from the main session; agents are spawned for focused parallel work (audits, design-to-code, browser validation). FRD generation, story point estimation, CSV export, strategist UX audits, and Drupal.org contribution integration. PM workflows: client triage, meeting prep, project heartbeats, QA review. Drupal/Pantheon DevOps automation.
